title: Friday Sermon 25 March 1988
description:
Good morals -- In continuation of my last sermon, I had emphasised upon Jihad against falsehood. This Jihad must begin from our homes. Good morals are essential in the refinement of human life and society. It is impossible to attain God’s love without them. Ill-behavior turns a human into an animalistic creature. Now the Western nations even exceed animals when it comes to being sexually astray and shameless. God has created a punishment for them which resembles the plague. The great purpose for which the Community has been created cannot be achieved without the adapting of good morals. While discussing the tradition of dowry in the Third World countries, it is extremely shameful to demand dowry from the girl’s family at the time of the wedding. This tradition must be uprooted. The teachings of the Promised Messiah (peace be upon him) comprise of good morals and they are a hallmark of admonishments. They must always be followed.


The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19880325-UR.pdf

An announcement made before the sermon in the presence of Hazrat Khalifatul Masih can be seen at http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r7cEgNsVAY8
